channel.title: truth.teller717 TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from truth.teller717

item.title: GET AIPAC OUT OF AMERICAN POLITICS! Let's unite whether you're on the right or the left....AIPAC has no place in our POLITICS! #aipac #americafirst #israel #thomasmassie #tuckercarlson

item.title: To say Massie lost simply because of Trump ignores the most expensive House primary in American history. When a PAC pumps millions into a race, they aren't just betting on a candidate, they're buying the outcome. Claiming Massie's defeat was just a Trump
item.description: To say Massie lost simply because of Trump ignores the most expensive House primary in American history. When a PAC pumps millions into a race, they aren't just betting on a candidate, they're buying the outcome. Claiming Massie's defeat was just a Trump

item.title: Tribalism and identity politics are designed to keep us fighting each other. The Left vs. Right narrative is an artificial distraction meant to divide us. When we unite as one, we take our power back. #Unite #americafirst #division #politics #OneNation
